messages.content:
If something is "mentioned" it is.....


a.
not discussed


b.
provides an alternative view


c.
referred to briefly


d.
referred to at length
c. referred to briefly

If you prove something you .........


a.
focuses on


b.
have shown something must be true using something that can be checked


c.
states with reasons


d.
referred to something indirectly
b. have shown something must be true using something that can be checked.

Which of the following is a synonym for "implies"?


a.
pinpoints


b.
suggests


c.
argues


d.
advances
b. suggests

Which of the following is a synonym for "shows"?


a.
demonstrates


b.
asserts


c.
emphasizes


d.
claims
a. demonstrates

Select the word that cannot be used with the following sentence



John questions / challenges / claims the accuracy of the government's figures.


a.
questions


b.
claims


c.
challenges
There is no word that cannot be used in this sentence. All three options are appropriate.

What is the given definition for the word "transition"?




a.
change from one form to another


b.
remove from one and put into an other


c.
change the language of a set of words


d.
move from one place to another
a. change from one form to another

Which is the given definition for the word "maintaining"?


a.
changing for the better


b.
building


c.
talking about


d.
not allowing to change
d. not allowing to change

Which is the given definition of the word "impact"?


a.
powerful impact


b.
an arena


c.
collision


d.
effect of
d. effect of

Which of the following is the given meaning for the phrase "move towards"?


a.
move up


b.
move sideways


c.
action taken to achieve something


d.
physically move nearer to the thing being discussed
d. physically move nearer to the thing being discussed

Which of the following words is the best fit in the following sentence?



After 25 years of building cars in Chonburi, Mitsubishi decided not to ____________________ to Laos, and will stay in the same location due to the quality of Thai workers.


a.
restore


b.
modify


c.
transfer


d.
acquire
c. transfer

Which of the following words is the best fit in the following sentence?


The number of tourists visiting in Thailand is ____________________________ in 2023 after China opened its borders.

a.
recovering


b.
fluctuating 


c.
diminishing


d.
converting
a. recovering

Which of the following words is the best fit in the following sentence?


The peer review helped John _______________________ his speech.

a.
relax


b.
transfer


c.
amend


d.
refine
d. refine

Which word is the following is the opposite of the word "gradual"?

a.
perceptible


b.
sudden


c.
marked


d.
steady
b. sudden

Which of the following words is a synonym for "sudden"?




a.
noticeable


b.
sharp


c.
steady


d.
slow
b. sharp

Which of the following is a synonym for "marked"?


a.
gradual


b.
small


c.
noticeable

d.
perceptible
c. noticeable
